message: Jake
Yuriko
Detective Maurice
I'm sorry for locking you up in a place like this for two days.
So, does that mean I get to go now?
Detective Maurice
For now, it was thought that it wasn't you. My, you have some good friends.
Before long, I was set free and released.
The sunlight, after a long time, was blinding.
However, my mind was a swirl of doubt, and I couldn't feel cheerful.
Boss!
? Did you come to pick me up?
I'm so glad!
I protested right away, but it took two days. I'm sorry.
No, it's fine. But,
I see, I was released because you were nagging.
That's not it, Jennifer seemed to have told someone higher up in the police.
Jennifer?
She teared up slightly.
Behind her, a Jaguar was approaching.
In the driver's seat was unmistakably Jennifer.
I'm so glad.
Really glad.
Jennifer.
She brought me all the way here. Make sure to thank her. What would have happened to Boss without her?
Yeah, that's true.
But don't cry, I'm really innocent.
I know, I know, but...
But, but...
I was about to go down the stairs to greet Jennifer.
However, before I could call out, Jennifer drove away.
She left only her beautiful smile behind.
- The next day -
Isn't it emotional to be back in the office after so long?
Um.
Yeah, I’m a bit shocked at how messy it is.
That's because the building is fundamentally old. It's not my fault, you know.
No, I actually like it like this. This old-fashioned atmosphere.
I'm glad the Boss is back. I was really worried about what might happen if it stayed like this.
By the way, have you heard from Guy?
No. The only calls I got while the Boss was away were from Jennifer and Gloria.
You got a call from Gloria?
Yes. Apparently, she's already moved out of that apartment and is heading back to Hong Kong.
She's probably already in Hong Kong.
I see.
But there hasn't been a call from Guy.
Is something going on?
No.
As I was sorting through everything that happened, I just felt the need to hear from Guy and Kristy.
Kristy has been visiting most of the victims, you know. But still, when I think about it,
if someone among the people I know is the culprit, it has to be one of them or an accomplice.
Boss.
You just got back and might be tired, but anyway, it’s better not to come to conclusions too quickly.
I know.
I know, but,
if this murder case follows the same pattern as the serial killings,
then,
one more person should be killed.
What!? Boss, what are you saying?
Think back to the parts that were missing from the victims.
If we add a head, we can form a human shape.
Oh, then,
that means the culprit has killed multiple women to create one person.
That’s strange, isn’t it?
It's strange. But I definitely think this criminal is committing murder for that reason.
No way, that's scary.
I don't know what they're thinking, but...
I think there's no doubt about that.
Boss, please go thank Jennifer for now. It would be rude not to.
You don't believe me, do you?
No, it's just that it's so incredible I can't keep up.
Hah.
For a while, I felt dazed and couldn’t touch anything.
After that, I went outside for the first time in a while.
